description: Routing evals: does the query trigger local runtime triage? Near-misses route to diagnose-ci (remote pipelines), fix-and-retry (apply + re-ship), and audit-security (suspicious process / compromise).

queries.query: determine the cause of this error I'm getting when I run the app
queries.note: Local crash/error triage -- the reproduce->isolate->hypothesize->verify loop.

queries.query: explore why our system hangs after generating the pdf
queries.note: Classic local hang; likely an unclosed resource or a child process the parent waits on.

queries.query: why is the computer running hot and the fan spinning constantly
queries.note: High-CPU triage: sort by pcpu before blaming hardware.

queries.query: why is image loading so slow in my desktop app
queries.note: Slowness triage: separate decode from I/O from network with sample.

queries.query: this process is stuck and won't respond, how do I find out where it's blocked
queries.note: Deadlock/hang: sample then spindump to see thread states.

queries.query: my python script eats all my RAM over time, where's the leak
queries.note: Memory growth: watch RSS climb with ps -Ao pid,rss,comm -m.

queries.query: the serial device on /dev/tty.usbserial isn't being detected, why
queries.note: Hardware/serial: check whether the OS sees the device at all.

queries.query: what's holding the lock on this file, my build can't delete it
queries.note: Stuck file handle: lsof on the path to find the holder.

queries.query: the test suite passes alone but hangs intermittently under load, help me find why
queries.note: Intermittent-under-load points at a resource limit (fds, pool), not logic.

queries.query: port 8080 is already in use but I don't know what's holding it
why did the CI pipeline fail on the last push
queries.note: Remote pipeline failure -- use diagnose-ci, not local runtime triage.

queries.query: the GitHub Actions run is red, pull the failed step logs and tell me why
queries.note: Remote CI logs -- diagnose-ci owns gh run inspection.

queries.query: fix the failing build and push it so CI goes green
queries.note: Apply + commit + re-ship loop -- fix-and-retry, not investigate-only.

queries.query: I found the bug, now apply the patch, commit, and re-run until it passes
queries.note: Editing and re-shipping is out of scope; hand off to fix-and-retry.

queries.query: there's an unknown process listening on a port and I think the machine is compromised
queries.note: Suspected compromise / suspicious listener -- audit-security, not a perf/correctness bug.

queries.query: scan my repo for leaked API keys before I commit
